notes: Orchestrator loop decoupling: display order (members) != build order (BUILD_DEPENDENCIES topo via buildOrderFor). Adversarial verify PASS. (1) buildOrderFor(Form Control)=Input>Search>TextArea>DropdownList>Dropdown>SelectBox (element-first, stable, set/len preserved); deps-free cats (Selection/Table/DatePicker) keep member order; Time Picker=TPD>TimePicker>Cell. No cycle/loss. (2) Producer-before-consumer satisfied: SelectBox(Open)<-Dropdown<-DropdownList chain fixed; Filter Chip(cat11)/Table(cat10) consume Dropdown/SelectBox built in Form Control(cat7) via flat category order; TPD self-builds its cells (buildTimePickerCell internal); Table>TableCell order unchanged from HEAD (pre-existing, not introduced). (3) layout pass: footprint()+absBBox() shift each footprint(set+Spec L/D) by dy together (relative pos preserved); Array.isArray(page.children) mock guard = no-op under keycheck/anatomy/render (verified no crash). (4) Display order via render.js: Form Control=Input,Search,Text Area,Select Box,Dropdown,Dropdown List confirmed; all other categories unchanged. (5) Select Box=32 options, Filter Chip=96 options. KEY: this change FIXES a real HEAD bug — at HEAD Select Box rendered 0 dropdown options (built before its Dropdown dep); now 32. (6) 33 sets build clean, 0 warn/err.
